skills.name: bastion
skills.description: High-performance Rust firewall for AI Agents. Intercepts, simulates, and validates transactions before signing. Protects against prompt injection, balance drain, and unauthorized program access on Solana.

skills.name: bastion-how-to-use
skills.description: Guide for agent developers on integrating Bastion AI Agent Firewall for Solana. Covers SDK usage, REST API endpoints, policy configuration, and on-chain audit.
